demo.title: Seed a new community LP vault
demo.code:
# Create a Money-paired community vault for a new token (USDC-backed)
./scripts/create-vault.sh mft-vault 0xYourToken 20 1000000 500
#   mft-vault   = factory key (MfTVaultFactory, pairs with Money/mftUSD)
#   0xYourToken = the token to pair
#   20          = USDC seed amount ($20 min)
#   1000000     = token amount to seed (sets initial price)
#   500         = max price impact in bps (5%)

# Create a new CharityFund clone (your own charity fund)
./scripts/create-fund.sh MyCharity MYC 0xCharityWalletAddress 3334

setup: Requires the Bankr skill with an API key configured
Fund your Bankr wallet with the required seed assets on Base (USDC, cbBTC, or wETH)
Enable arbitrary contract calls (Bankr Security -> keep 'Disable arbitrary contract calls' OFF)
